title: Dream — tribal fight with the boys (Trump squad, Riley's bullet-proof flannel)
html:
Dream — tribal fight with the boys (Trump squad, Riley's bullet-proof flannel)

Source: 2020-05-07 Apple Note. One of several pandemic-era dream logs from Grants Pass — Yahir was 17, locked down, dreaming about JoJo-style ability battles with friends.

TL;DR

  • Dream during peak COVID lockdown where Yahir's friend group fights another squad led by Donald Trump and Harley Quinn, each fighter with a unique ability.
  • The opposing girl with a "curve-the-bullet" ability is described as Ashley Bell-like — anime/JoJo's Bizarre Adventure influence is explicit ("like in jojos").
  • Riley taunts Yahir for not having a bullet-proof flannel, then Yahir gets singled out in a hallway with everyone watching — classic anxiety dream of public exposure.
  • Confirms the dream as self knowledge pattern: Yahir's pandemic dreams kept casting him as the singled-out underdog needing to fight or hide.
  • Filed alongside the home shooter dream a month later — both surface the same theme: friends and family put him in danger, and he has to figure out how to survive.

Pattern observed

This is part of the 2020 COVID dream cluster — several recorded dreams in the lockdown months where Yahir is in a tribal/combat scenario with the boys (Riley, the GP crew). The dreams are JoJo/anime-inflected (special abilities, single combat, public stakes). They're early evidence of the fear of not doing anxiety surfacing as nightmares.

Open questions

  • Who's "Riley"? Same Riley from the shooter dream and the Ahmad Jamal stream (Rileybonney)?
  • Why Donald Trump as the antagonist faction? Grants Pass political climate?

Related

  • covid pandemic era
  • fear of not doing
  • grants pass or
  • stray dog and lightning bolt
  • 2020 06 13 dream shooter prep — the matching shooter-prep dream a month later
